text: Starting something new and uncertain takes a special kind of courage, and the fact that this scares you a little just means it matters to you. That's a good sign, not a warning. You've thought this through, you've prepared, and you're more ready than the fear wants you to believe. Nobody who ever built something worth building felt fully certain at the start. Take it one step at a time, be patient with yourself when things get messy, and remember that stumbling is part of learning, not proof that you were wrong to try. I believe in you, and I'm here for the wins and the setbacks alike. Go for it.
